showTempValue.desc: Display the current degrees alongside the condition.
showTempValue.label: Show temperature value

showTempUnit.desc: Show °C or °F indicating the temperature unit when using a horizontal bar.
showTempUnit.label: Show temperature unit when horizontal

showConditionIcon.desc: Include the visual weather symbol in the widget.
showConditionIcon.label: Show condition icon

tooltipOption.desc: Choose what you would like the tooltip to display.
tooltipOption.label: Tooltip options

customColor.desc: Choose what color you would like the icon and text to be.
customColor.label: Custom color
